text:
the Moon in Vargottamamsa. (According to some
the aspecting planets should be in IV, VII and X houses).
(xi) Venus occupying the asterism Asvini be in the Lagna
and be aspected by all the planets (i.e. other than the Sun and
Mercury).
(xii) Three or more planets be in their own Amsas (and not

RAJAYOGAS 165
m the Amsas of their depression) and one of them be in the
ascendant.
(xiii) All the seven planets be in their own houses.
(xiv) The lord of the ascendant being strong and Venus be
in 11 house which is neither his (Venus') inimical house nor his
depression.
(xv) The Moon occupying at night her own Navamsa or
one owned by a very friendly planet and be aspected by Venus alone.
(xvi) Venus be in VargottamarhSa in Pisces which is the
ascendant.
(xvii) The lord of the Lagna in strength be in his exaltation
and be aspected by the Moon.
(xviii) The Lagna-lord alone be in a Kendra identical with
his exaltation, provided his Navamsa is owned neither by his
